roa.docketEntryComment: Warrant - Sheriff Affidavit Warrant Received Served 03-21-22
Order of the Court Finding Good Cause  to Continue due to  Public Health RE COVID-19 Pandemic
Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Prior to Release
Defendant Change of Plea to "Guilty" or "No Contest" - Acknowledgement and Advisement of Defendant Pleading Guilty or No Contest

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/X: DEFENDANT IS TERMINATED FROM CJC, FOUND NOTCLINICALLY SUITABLE/X: MATTER TO RETURN TO M11/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND FURTHER STAYED TO 01-11-22/X: BAIL SET AT $500/CONTD: BENCH WARRANT STAY/DOPC/
/CAL:CJC PRG & PTC/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D//NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO01-04-22/X: BAIL SET AT $500/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT DISCHARGE/BWDNC/OR/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS RE-REFERRED TO CJC OUT OF CUSTODY/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SETFORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROMCUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:CJC RE-REFERRAL/DOP/
/CAL:CJC PRG RPT AND PTC/X:CASE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE LITTLE APPEARING VIA ZOOM/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:10,000/BWNUM:1ST/BWRET:M11/X: 6 OF 6 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/

/CAL:TO JOIN OTHER CASES/DAWT/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TORELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:CJC PROGRESS REPORT & STAY AWAY ORDERS/DOPC/

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/BAIL:10000/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/SA1:AGUSTIN GOMEZ RIQUIAC/SA2:2890 3RD STREET, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD:DEPT 8 CJC TO JOIN OTHER CASES/DOP/
/CAL:CJC PRG RPT & PTC/CONTD: TO SET JURY TRIAL/DOPC/DAWT/
/CAL:ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/X:RELEASE ON ACM IS DENIED/CONTD:COMMUNITY JUSTICE COURT/DOP/
